name: Build & Deploy with Approval
description: Run tests, get human approval, then create a deployment summary. Rejection loops back to re-run tests.
goal: Build, verify, and deploy the project with human oversight

nodes.name: Run Tests
nodes.prompt: Run the test suite in {{var:project_path}} and report the results. Include pass/fail counts, any error details, and overall status.

nodes.name: Review & Approve
nodes.prompt: Review the test results before proceeding with deployment.

nodes.name: Deploy Summary
nodes.prompt:
The tests passed and deployment was approved. Create a deployment summary based on the test results:

{{node:bd1.output}}
